items.span: The location was great.

The only thing I really wanted was beach lounges, the beach is beautiful!

One of the dirtiest hotel I have ever seen.

Poor cousine.

room was spacious and nicely cleaned every day.

Right on the beach.

the shower barely had water coming out of it, lights not working and dangerous power points.
